response.title: Communication Workflow — Happy Path
response.description: Automated workflow based on the most frequent communication variant: Teams messaging followed by a call and return to messaging. This workflow handles the standard communication flow with decision points for escalation and email follow-up.

steps.label: Communication Initiated
steps.description: A communication workflow is triggered by an incoming message, meeting invite, or user action.

steps.label: Open Teams Application
steps.description: User opens or switches to Microsoft Teams to handle the communication.

steps.label: Requires live call?
steps.description: Determine if the communication requires a synchronous call or can be handled via chat/message.

steps.label: Conduct Teams Call
steps.description: Initiate or join a Microsoft Teams call for real-time discussion.

steps.label: Requires email follow-up?
steps.description: Determine if an email summary or follow-up is needed.

steps.label: Compose Email in Outlook
steps.description: Draft and send an email via New Outlook with relevant context from Teams conversation.

steps.label: Respond in Teams
steps.description: Send chat response or share update in the Teams channel.

steps.label: Post-Call Follow-up in Teams
steps.description: After the call, return to Teams to share notes, action items, or update the channel.
